name: foch
description: Preview VS Code client for EU4 Script powered by foch_lsp

fochLsp.serverPath.description: Optional server command override. Empty means prefer the bundled foch_lsp binary, then fall back to cargo in a repo checkout.

fochLsp.serverArgs.description: Arguments passed to a custom server command. Ignored when the bundled server is used.

fochLsp.serverCwd.description: Working directory for launching the server. Empty means first workspace folder.

fochLsp.gamePath.description: Optional EU4 game root. Passed to FOCH_LSP_TARGETS_JSON with role=game.

fochLsp.modPaths.description: Optional mod root paths. Passed to FOCH_LSP_TARGETS_JSON with role=mod.

fochLsp.autoDetectMods.description: Automatically detect mod roots by searching workspace for descriptor.mod.

fochLsp.autoDetectModsMax.description: Maximum descriptor.mod files to scan when auto detecting mod roots.

scripts.test: npm run prepare:server && npm run smoke
